interpreted_controls.control_objective: To ensure that all applicable Treasury requirements relating to 'Cyber Security Governance', thereby enabling The Company to demonstrate full regulatory adherence and reduce Financial Risk exposure.

Implementing 'Cyber Security Governance' reduces the attack surface and demonstrates security maturity to regulators and customers alike.
